page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.32xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor with an x86_64 architecture. The processor operates at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz with 128 physical cores and 1.0 thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance provides 512.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external block storage. Network performance is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps. The instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses or integrated GPU hardware.

This instance is designed for large-scale enterprise workloads, web serving, containerized applications, and databases that require high parallel processing capabilities but do not need local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The dedicated hardware allocation offers high resource density and predictable performance for multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.32xlarge is a general-purpose KVM-based virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this instance offers a dedicated CPU allocation with 1.0 thread per core, ensuring predictable compute performance. It provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, relying on external block storage solutions, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps. This configuration is suitable for enterprise applications, web serving, and containerized environments requiring high parallel processing capabilities.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.32xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 40 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for multi-threaded enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-core general-purpose instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, balanced memory, and high-speed networking for enterprise workloads.
